intentSynonyms: look up post responses in medium
fetch a single post responses in medium
view one specific post responses in medium
get comments on a post in medium
description: Get responses (comments) on a Medium post. Returns the response count, response posts, and an opaque next_cursor. Pass next_cursor back as cursor to fetch the next page — this is the only way to retrieve responses past the first page.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response (next_cursor). Omit to fetch the first page.
